creator: oliver.solaris@gmail.com
text:
Too bad but it is interesting that Solaris 10 had exactly the same
issue with the wpi driver.

Anyway thanks for taking a look to this issue.


On Thu, 30 Dec 2010 12:12:43 +0100
Bernhard Schmidt <bschmidt@freebsd.org> wrote:

> On Sunday 19 December 2010 18:10:11 Oliver Ebert wrote:
> >  Bernhard Schmidt <bschmidt@techwires.net> wrote:
> >  > Is this still an issue on a recent stable/8 or 8.2-BETA1?
> > 
> >  With 8.1 it is but I didn't had a chance to check with 8.2 beta.
> 
> According to John Baldwin this is long standing issue within our
> {ACPI,PCI}-Bridge code, not directly related to the device driver
> itself. Way above my clue level.. sorry for the noise.
>
